name: Cracker Jacks
recipeIngredient: 2 poppers of corn or 2/3 cup unpopped corn
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil sugar and corn syrup until they reach the hard ball stage.
2. Add salt, soda, and oil or butter to the mixture. Mix well with the popped corn.
3. Place the mixture in an oven preheated to 350-375°F (175-190°C) and bake for about 15 minutes, stirring occasionally, until crisp.
4. Remove from the pan and spread on a plate.
1. Boil honey, sugar, condensed milk, maple hot syrup, and butter until they reach the hard ball stage.
2. Pour the mixture over the popcorn and mix thoroughly.
3. Allow to cool before breaking up into desired pieces.
